title: Stop testing your SAAS manually
summary: KaneAI is an automated QA testing tool that accepts plain English descriptions of test cases, automatically generates and runs tests, and reports results. It aims to reduce testing overhead and costs by automating work traditionally done by QA teams.
writeup: This video demonstrates KaneAI, an automated QA testing tool that takes plain English descriptions of test cases, then generates, runs, and reports on the tests automatically. The relevance is in shifting browser-based SaaS testing away from manual QA effort toward agent-driven workflow automation. Key takeaways: test cases are specified in natural language rather than scripted by hand, and the stated goal is reducing testing overhead and costs traditionally carried by QA teams.
